verses.arabicText: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًۭا
verses.translationText: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur'an.

verses.arabicText: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًۭا
verses.translationText: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَٰحِبَةًۭ وَلَا وَلَدًۭا
verses.translationText: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًۭا
verses.translationText: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًۭا
verses.translationText: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًۭا
verses.translationText: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًۭا
verses.translationText: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger].

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًۭا شَدِيدًۭا وَشُهُبًۭا
verses.translationText: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْءَانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًۭا رَّصَدًۭا
verses.translationText: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًۭا
verses.translationText: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًۭا
verses.translationText: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًۭا
verses.translationText: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

verses.arabicText: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًۭا وَلَا رَهَقًۭا
verses.translationText: And when we heard the guidance, we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.
